Dark Skies (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,418,667Details
International Box Office $10,285,444
Worldwide Box Office $27,704,111
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,467,986
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,238,008
Total $6,705,994
Further financial details...

Synopsis

As suburban husband and wife Daniel and Lacey Barret witness an escalating series of disturbing events involving their family, their safe and peaceful home quickly unravels. When it becomes clear that the Barret family is being targeted by an unimaginably terrifying and deadly force, Daniel and Lacey take matters in their own hands to solve the mystery of what is after their family.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,189,166 (47.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.13 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$3,500,000 (worldwide box office is 7.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,313 opening theaters/2,313 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $25,624,503

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 22nd, 2013 (Wide) by Weinstein Co.
International Releases: February 21st, 2013 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
February 28th, 2013 (Wide) (Malaysia)
March 15th, 2013 (Wide) (Latvia)
March 15th, 2013 (Wide) (Lithuania)
March 21st, 2013 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: May 28th, 2013 by Anchor Bay Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, terror throughout, sexual material, drug content and language - all involving teens.
(Rating bulletin 2256, 1/26/2013)
Running Time: 97 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Digital Cinematography, Intertitle
Plot point: Architecture, Fired, Surprise Twist, Unbelieving Police
Social setting: Alien Invasion
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Dimension Films, Alliance Films, IM Global, Blumhouse, Robotproof
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

As suburban husband and wife Daniel and Lacey Barret witness an escalating series of disturbing events involving their family, their safe and peaceful home quickly unravels. When it becomes clear that the Barret family is being targeted by an unimaginably terrifying and deadly force, Daniel and Lacey take matters in their own hands to solve the mystery of what is after their family.
